# Bug Report - [Bug Name]

## Summary
Short, concrete description of the bug and its impact.

## Environment
- App/Service: [name]
- Version/Commit: [sha or tag]
- Platform: [macOS/Windows/Linux/iOS/Android]
- Device/Browser: [model, browser version]
- API/Backend: [env/URL]

## Reproduction Steps
1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected Behavior
What should happen.

## Actual Behavior
What happens instead.

## Scope & Impact
- Affected users/flows:
- Severity: [low/medium/high/critical]
- Frequency: [always/intermittent]

## Evidence
- Logs: [attach key NDJSON excerpts or links]
- Screenshots/Video: [links]
- Error messages: [verbatim]

## Root Cause
Explain the confirmed root cause (log-backed).

## Fix
Summary of the fix and where it was applied.

## Verification
- Post-fix reproduction steps
- Log evidence confirming resolution

## Notes
Any follow-ups or related issues.
